title: Simple Guestbook
content:
A friend of mine has asked me to write a  **Simple Guestbook**  with template-able output for her (her homework, actually). Anything with template is NO LONGER SIMPLE! Anyway, it's done.

Since it's going to be only her homework, so I guess I'll put it up here. In case some of you might be able to make use of it -or- if you're learning how to PHP, this one will be a good example of "NOT TO DO". Hehehehe .. Decide for yourself. :)

"Grab it here":files/gbook.tar.gz  (4KB)

No DEMO up here. Too lazy already. :P
